title: Contract got extended, BUMA Australia rakes in AUD 200 million
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), obtains an extension for its mining service contract in Meandu Mine, Queensland, Australia, until 2026.

title: VTNY secures loan facility of IDR 275 billion
body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 275 billion from PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) as of yesterday (24/9).

title: Driving domestic economy, UOB Indonesia to boost foreign investment and export
body: With growth projection of Indonesia’s economy in 2024 at 5.2%, Bank UOB Indonesia as the renowned regional bank, is ready to facilitate foreign direct investment (FDI) inflow to Indonesia whilst boosting export volume and portion in GDP.

title: Bank UOB Indonesia links gov’t and industry in UOB Economic Outlook 2025
body: Bank UOB Indonesia officially hosts UOB Economic Outlook 2025 today (25/9) in Jakarta, titled “Ushering a New Dawn for a Remarkable Indonesia”, discussing chances and opportunities to advance Indonesia’s economy in 2025 under the new presidential term.

title: Hoffmen Cleanindo saw 41.9% profit surge in first half of 2024
body: PT Hoffmen Cleanindo Tbk (KING), a professional hygiene service provider, booked revenue of IDR 140.65 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Contract got extended, BUMA Australia rakes in AUD 200 million
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA), a subsidiary of PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID), obtains an extension for its mining service contract in Meandu Mine, Queensland, Australia, until 2026.

title: VTNY secures loan facility of IDR 275 billion
body: PT Venteny Fortuna International Tbk (VTNY) has acquired a credit facility worth IDR 275 billion from PT Bank Mayapada Internasional Tbk (MAYA) as of yesterday (24/9).

title: Driving domestic economy, UOB Indonesia to boost foreign investment and export
body: With growth projection of Indonesia’s economy in 2024 at 5.2%, Bank UOB Indonesia as the renowned regional bank, is ready to facilitate foreign direct investment (FDI) inflow to Indonesia whilst boosting export volume and portion in GDP.

title: Bank UOB Indonesia links gov’t and industry in UOB Economic Outlook 2025
body: Bank UOB Indonesia officially hosts UOB Economic Outlook 2025 today (25/9) in Jakarta, titled “Ushering a New Dawn for a Remarkable Indonesia”, discussing chances and opportunities to advance Indonesia’s economy in 2025 under the new presidential term.

title: Hoffmen Cleanindo saw 41.9% profit surge in first half of 2024
body: PT Hoffmen Cleanindo Tbk (KING), a professional hygiene service provider, booked revenue of IDR 140.65 billion in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: KLAS plans stock dividend and bonus shares distribution
body: PT Pelayaran Kurnia Lautan Semesta Tbk (KLAS), a logistics and delivery company, will initiate a stock dividend and bonus shares distribution.

title: Investors in Lippo General Insurance record stock changes as a result of 1:10 stock split
body: On Thursday, September 19, the general insurance company PT Lippo General Insurance Tbk (LPGI) conducted a 1:10 stock split. The corporate action's effect: Three large LPGI investors reported a big change in their share portions on the market hints. First, from 178.39 million shares to 1.78 billion shares, PT Hanwha Life Insurance Indonesia, the controller of 59.46% of LPGI shares, has increased its holdings. PT Inti Anugerah Pratama, the owner of 23% of LPGI shares, reported a change in shares from 69 million to 690 million shares. Then, with 14.9% of the shares, foreign investor Hanwha General Insurance Co. Ltd. now owns 447 million, ten times more than 44.70 million previously owned.

title: UNTR’s subsidiary acquires Lestarikan Bumi Papua
body: PT Pertiwi Nusantara Raya (PNR), a subsidiary of PT United Tractors Tbk (UNTR), has wrapped up the acquisition of PT Lestarikan Bumi Papua (LBP) from two of its affiliated shareholders for IDR 67.5 billion.

title: Bids in today’s sukuk auction hit IDR 32.33 trillion
body: The amount of incoming bids recorded in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (lit. Surat Berharga Syariah Negara/SBSN) or State Sukuk today (24/9).

title: Afternoon session, JCI saw improvement
body: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) remained solid at the green zone while closing the first and entering the second session today (24/9) at 2.15 PM WIB.

title: Bank DBS Indonesia to work with Mirae Asset to launch multi-currency RDN
body: PT Bank DBS Indonesia has officially launched its investment account (Rekening Dana Nasabah/RDN) service, pairing up with PT Mirae Asset Sekuritas Indonesia (Mirae Asset) as its security company partner to facilitate easier and swift investment.

title: HATM teams up with Seacon to form JV
body: PT Habco Trans Maritima Tbk (HATM) collaborates with Seacon Ships Management Group (HK) Limited (Seacon) to form a joint venture company based in Singapore.

title: After IPO, PACK net profit grows 11.2%
body: PT Solusi Kemasan Digital Tbk (PACK), a plastic packaging manufacturer for the snack food to cosmetic industry with the FlexyPack brand, posted a net profit of IDR1.29 billion in the first semester (1H) of 2024.

title: Remala Abadi takes over 85% Fiber Media Indonesia shares
body: PT Remala Abadi Tbk (DATA) acquired 85% of PT Fiber Media Indonesia (FMI) shares for IDR 19.97 billion. This acquisition reflects DATA's optimism after achieving an increase in performance in the first semester of 2024.

title: Here is the list of prospective DGNS shareholders
body: A number of new investors will become shareholders of PT Diagnos Laboratorium Utama Tbk (DGNS) via a rights issue that will be approved by shareholders next week (2/10).

title: JKON pockets IDR 21.16 billion in dividend income
body: PT Jaya Konstruksi Manggala Pratama Tbk (JKON), a construction services issuer, announced dividend income of IDR 21.16 billion.

title: MSIN’s shareholders agree upon stock split of 1:5 ratio
body: PT MNC Digital Entertainment Tbk (MSIN) has secured approval from Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders to initiate a stock split with a ratio of 1:5.

title: BWPT’s subsidiary secures facility of IDR 382 billion
body: PT Tandan Sawit Papua (TSP), one of many subsidiaries of PT Eagle High Plantations Tbk (BWPT), has obtained a loan facility of IDR 382 billion from an affiliate.

title: Govt in negotiation for additional 10% stake in Freeport Indonesia
body: The Indonesian government is considering adding 10% of the share ownership in PT Freeport Indonesia (PTFI).

title: LABA secures battery pack procurement contract
body: PT Green Power Battery (GPB), a subsidiary of PT Green Power Group Tbk (LABA), has secured a contract to procure electric vehicle battery packs worth a total of IDR 139 billion from PT Gotion Indonesia Materials (GIM).

title: JKON channels IDR 7.51 billion in capital to Wika Tirta Jaya Jatiluhur
body: PT Jaya Konstruksi Manggala Pratama Tbk (JKON) has provided a capital injection of IDR 7.51 billion for PT Wika Tirta Jaya Jatiluhur (WTJJ).

title: Pefindo gives two positive signals for these 2 issuers
body: Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (Pefindo) has assigned an “idA” rating to General Obligations (GO) of PT Cimanggis Cibitung Tollways (CCT) and PT Buana Finance Tbk (BBLD).

title: BREN management reveals it has met free float requirements
body: PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk. (BREN) has currently complied with the free float regulation of 11.66% of the total shares or 15.6 billion shares. This amount is higher than the stock exchange's provisions which stipulate a minimum of 7.5% of the total shares.

title: PTPP prepares IDR 250 billion to pay off OB I in 2019
body: The management of PT PP (Persero) Tbk (PTPP) has prepared funds amounting to IDR250 billion to pay off PTPP's Shelf Registration Bonds I Phase I Year 2019 Series B which will mature on November 27, 2024.

title: Foreign share trading surged, closing at -3.45 billion shares
body: Foreign investors' share buying and selling activity on Friday, September 20, resulted in rather significant foreign purchasing and selling volumes, with 14.27 billion shares sold and 10.81 billion shares bought. As a result, net foreign volume closed at -3.45 billion shares. Shares in digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) and telecommunications company PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN) were sold in billions of shares. Foreign investors were observed selling 7.10 billion GOTO shares for a net volume of -2.25 billion shares and 2.20 billion FREN shares for a net volume of -665.05 million shares.

title: After debut, NICE net profit plummeted 90.3%
body: PT Adhi Kartiko Pratama Tbk (NICE), a nickel mining issuer listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) early this year, only posted a net profit of IDR2.33 billion in the first quarter (Q1) of 2024.

title: Green Power Group subsidiary to start battery production
body: PT Green Power Battery (GPB), a subsidiary of PT Green Power Group Tbk (LABA), will soon begin the battery production phase for electric vehicle needs.

title: Alibaba Group official appointed as CTO GOTO
body: Shareholders of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) have appointed William Xiong as Chief Technology Officer (CTO). William's presence at GOTO strengthens Alibaba Group's commitment to investing in this largest marketplace company.

title: BREN share price plunges 19.95% after kicked off from FTSE Index
body: The share price of PT Barito Renewables Energy Tbk (BREN) fell 19.95% to IDR8,825 per share at the start of trading today.

title: Barito Pacific lets go of eight billion shares of Chandra Asri (TPIA)
body: On Wednesday, September 18, PT Barito Pacific Tbk, the company that owns nearly 20% of the shares of PT Chandra Asri Pacific Tbk (TPIA), released 8 billion shares of this petrochemical processing and manufacturing company. Barito Pacific's share portion fell by nearly half to 10.62% as soon as shares were sold through PT Harita Kencana Sekuritas.

title: Govt holds another state sukuk auction, targets IDR 8 trillion in funds
body: The Indonesian government once again will hold an auction of State Sharia Securities (SBSN) or State Sukuk on Tuesday (24/9) next week, with an indicative target of IDR 8 trillion.

title: DSNG ready to operate Boyolali wood pallet factory
body: PT Biomassa Lestari Nusantara (BLN), a joint venture between PT Dharma Energi Investama, a subsidiary of PT Dharma Satya Nusantara Tbk (DSNG) and PT Sumitomo Forestry Indonesia, a subsidiary of Sumitomo Forestry Co. Ltd, conducted a trial operation of the first wood pellet factory in Boyolali, Central Java.

title: Foreign sell nearly 6 billion shares, net foreign volume plunges to -629.42 million shares
body: Foreign share selling activity on Thursday, September 19 resulted in a foreign selling volume of 5.99 billion shares. The largest contributor to this high number was the selling of 3.55 billion shares of digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), for a net volume of -1 billion shares. On the other hand, foreign investors also purchased shares and recorded a foreign purchase volume of 5.36 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume ended at -629.42 million shares.

title: Majukarya Mandiri sells 97 million Buana Lintas Lautan (BULL) shares
body: PT Majukarya Mandiri Indonesia released 97 million shares of PT Buana Lintas Lautan Tbk (BULL), the oil and gas tanker company, on Tuesday, September 17. After selling its shares through PT Henan Putihrai Sekuritas and three other securities, this investor immediately decreased its ownership from 5.95% to 5.26%.

title: Master Print offers 435 million shares via IPO
body: PT Master Print Tbk (PTMR), a company engaged in the trading and distribution of industrial packaging equipment, will release 435 million shares in an Initial Public Offering (IPO).
